title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DHL India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DHL India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DHL India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About DHL India:
DHL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DHL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
